title: Veganism - Request. I think it's groovy.

enrichment.summary: Kyle discusses his positive views on veganism, sharing stories about animal cruelty in slaughterhouses, his own dietary habits living with his meat-eating mother, and health benefits of plant-based diets including reducing dairy for asthma.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: thinks it's groovy and the way to go
strongly opposed to industrial killing of animals
wants to be vegetarian but eats meat due to living situation with mom
should reduce dairy for health reasons
finds them annoying when they trash vegans

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He likes vegans.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He was with his mom at the mall a couple months ago and saw vegans passing out literature about veganism.

claims.subject: vegans
claims.claim: They had a YouTube channel showing videos of animal torture.

claims.subject: veganism
claims.claim: The main reason people should be vegans and vegetarians is to avoid an industry of killing animals.

claims.subject: slaughterhouses
claims.claim: Cows are knocked unconscious by being whacked over the head and then torn apart while still alive, screaming in terror.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He went on a bike ride on Monday and saw black cows in a field, noting they are smart animals similar to horses.

claims.subject: meat industry
claims.claim: Eating meat means consuming the fear and adrenaline of animals that were terrified before death.

claims.subject: industrialized cow farming
claims.claim: Eastern Colorado has huge cow farms visible on Google Earth, where cows live in hot, barren dirt pits filled with waste.

claims.subject: humans
claims.claim: Humans have long intestinal tracts and are naturally omnivores, capable of living fine on plants.

claims.subject: Bashar aliens
claims.claim: Bashar aliens said humans are naturally omnivores but don't eat.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He thinks humans should phase out meat.

claims.subject: Kyle's family
claims.claim: His mom is a big meat eater, and his brother is a vegetarian but doesn't live with them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He would be a vegetarian if he didn't live with his mom, who feeds him meat.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He tries to eat healthy and strong, preferring chicken over beef.

claims.subject: Kyle's mom
claims.claim: She eats meat that is hard to chew, like roadkill.

claims.subject: future generations
claims.claim: New generations will become more vegetarian.

claims.subject: protein powder
claims.claim: Protein powder is an easier way to regulate protein intake, as the body can only absorb about 30 grams per hour.

claims.subject: Olympic athletes
claims.claim: Only 2% of Olympic athletes are vegetarian, likely because it's easier to eat meat for calorie intake.

claims.subject: bodybuilders
claims.claim: Bodybuilders often live on chicken.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He praised the vegan group he saw for motivating people to go vegan.

claims.subject: veganism
claims.claim: Veganism is awesome, and it involves avoiding dairy as well.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He had a bad asthma attack after cleaning his house and inhaling dust.

claims.subject: asthma
claims.claim: Getting rid of dairy can help reduce asthma because dairy creates mucus.

claims.subject: humans
claims.claim: Humans only became lactose tolerant 6,000 years ago due to a random mutation.

claims.subject: Scythians and Mongolians
claims.claim: They survived by eating bugs, leeches, ticks, and making beef jerky from their horses.

claims.subject: lactose tolerance
claims.claim: A mutation 4,000 years ago allowed humans to drink milk without getting sick, spreading lactose tolerance worldwide.

claims.subject: dairy
claims.claim: Many people are still lactose intolerant, and reducing dairy could lead to less heart disease.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He thinks future diets will first eliminate meat, then dairy, and eventually find other protein sources.

claims.subject: militant meat eaters
claims.claim: They annoy Kyle because they trash vegans and are proud of eating meat.

claims.subject: vegan athletes
claims.claim: There are vegan athlete channels, and Kyle's vegetarian brother is fitter than him, proving you can be an athlete without meat.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He respects vegans and plans to become a vegetarian after his mom is no longer around.
